title: Festive Crunchy Avocado Stir-fry
description: An earthy and festive Venezuelan dish featuring avocado cubes cooked in a flavorful vinaigrette dressing with a quick pressure-cooking method.

ingredients.name: 2 ripe avocados
ingredients.notes: Use Hass variety for firmer texture.

instructions: Press avocados and remove pits. Dice into small cubes.
Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add diced avocado cubes and cook until they release their moisture, about 2 minutes.
Add red bell pepper and garlic; stir for another minute.
Stir in minced cilantro leaves; close lid and cook under high pressure for 5 minutes.
Quick-release the cooker and discard steam valve contents. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve warm with a side of your favorite tortilla chips or as a dip with pita bread.
